name: lockfile-conflict-resolution
description: pnpm-lock.yaml add/add conflicts: delete the conflicted lockfile and regenerate with pnpm install; do not attempt to manually resolve lockfile conflicts
Merge conflict failed at tier ai-resolve. Branch: overstory/builder-core/sisu-1863. Agent: builder-core. Conflicting files: .mulch/mulch.config.yaml.
Merge conflict resolved at tier auto-resolve. Branch: overstory/merger-templates/sisu-8b64. Agent: merger-templates. Conflicting files: .mulch/mulch.config.yaml.

name: better-sqlite3-rebuild
description: better-sqlite3 requires native module rebuild after pnpm install in new worktrees: run 'cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@*/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npm rebuild' when tests fail with 'Could not locate the bindings file'

name: pnpm-test-vs-bun-test
description: Use 'pnpm test' (runs pnpm -r test → vitest per package) not 'bun test' (bun runner) for workspace packages that use native Node addons like better-sqlite3. bun test cannot load native bindings.

name: cherry-pick-over-conflict
description: When branches conflict only on .mulch/mulch.config.yaml domain list, cherry-pick the implementation commits cleanly then manually merge mulch config by unioning domain lists from all branches
